all.en: This notice serves as a reminder of our annual anti-harassment training.
all.zh: 本通知旨在提醒各位本年度的反騷擾訓練。

all.en: Participation is mandatory for every employee, contractor, and intern.
all.zh: 所有員工、承包商及實習生皆須參加。

all.en: The training reinforces our commitment to a safe and respectful workplace.
all.zh: 本訓練再次強調我們對安全且尊重職場的承諾。

all.en: It also ensures compliance with current employment laws and regulations.
all.zh: 並確保符合現行勞動法規與規範。

all.en: This year course has been refreshed with updated case studies and scenarios.
all.zh: 今年課程已更新案例研究及情境內容。

all.en: Topics include verbal, physical, visual, and digital forms of harassment.
all.zh: 主題包括言語、肢體、視覺及數位形式的騷擾。

all.en: Special attention is given to subtle behaviors such as microaggressions.
all.zh: 特別關注如微歧視等較不明顯的行為。

all.en: The module covers bystander intervention strategies in a variety of situations.
all.zh: 模組涵蓋於各種情境中的旁觀者介入策略。

all.en: Practical guidance is provided on how to escalate concerns appropriately.
all.zh: 並提供如何適當升級通報疑慮的實用指引。

all.en: Managers receive an additional session focused on their unique responsibilities.
all.zh: 主管將另接受一場聚焦其特有責任的訓練。

all.en: The manager session covers recognizing warning signs and supporting affected employees.
all.zh: 主管場次涵蓋辨識警訊及支援受影響員工。

all.en: Both sessions are available in English, Mandarin, Japanese, and Korean.
all.zh: 兩場次均提供英文、中文、日文及韓文版本。

all.en: Live virtual sessions are scheduled across multiple time zones for convenience.
all.zh: 為方便起見，現場線上場次橫跨多個時區安排。

all.en: A self-paced version is also available through the learning management system.
all.zh: 亦可透過學習管理系統使用自學版本。

all.en: The standard course takes approximately ninety minutes to complete.
all.zh: 標準課程約需九十分鐘完成。

all.en: Completion is required no later than the thirtieth of next month.
all.zh: 完成期限不得晚於下個月三十日。

all.en: A short knowledge check at the end confirms understanding of key concepts.
all.zh: 課程末尾設有簡短知識檢核以確認對重點概念的理解。

all.en: A passing score of eighty percent is required for course credit.
all.zh: 課程學分要求通過分數需達百分之八十。

all.en: If you wish to report a concern, please contact the ethics office.
all.zh: 若您希望通報相關疑慮，請聯絡倫理辦公室。

all.en: Multiple confidential reporting channels remain available year-round.
all.zh: 多個保密通報管道全年持續開放。

all.en: Retaliation against anyone who reports in good faith is strictly prohibited.
all.zh: 對善意通報者的任何報復行為均嚴格禁止。

all.en: Completion records are stored securely and used solely for compliance purposes.
all.zh: 完成紀錄將安全保存並僅用於合規目的。

all.en: Thank you for helping us maintain a workplace where everyone can thrive.
all.zh: 感謝您協助我們維持一個讓每個人都能發展的職場。

all.en: Completion certificates will appear automatically in your training profile upon passing.
all.zh: 通過後完成證書將自動顯示於您的訓練檔案中。

all.en: Reminder emails will be sent two weeks before the final deadline approaches.
all.zh: 於最終截止日前兩週將發送提醒電子郵件。

all.en: Non completion will be escalated to managers and may affect performance reviews.
all.zh: 未完成將回報主管並可能影響績效考核。

all.en: An anonymous question portal allows participants to submit topics for discussion.
all.zh: 匿名提問入口讓參與者得以提交討論主題。

all.en: Office hours with the ethics team are offered weekly during the training window.
all.zh: 訓練期間倫理團隊每週提供諮詢時段。

all.en: Aggregate completion data is shared with senior leadership on a monthly cadence.
all.zh: 彙整完成數據每月與高階管理層分享。

all.en: Refresher modules are available throughout the year for those seeking additional review.
all.zh: 全年皆提供複習模組供需進一步檢視的同仁使用。

all.en: New hires must complete the training within thirty days of their start date.
all.zh: 新進員工須於到職日起三十日內完成訓練。

all.en: Regional teams may add localized examples to reflect cultural and legal context.
all.zh: 各區域團隊可加入本地化範例以反映文化與法律情境。

all.en: Together we build a culture rooted in dignity, respect, and accountability daily.
all.zh: 我們共同打造一個以尊嚴、尊重與當責為日常根基的文化。

all.en: Hotline operators are trained to handle disclosures with sensitivity and care.
all.zh: 熱線接線員受訓以同理與謹慎處理通報內容。

all.en: Investigations follow documented procedures with clearly defined timelines.
all.zh: 調查依書面程序進行並有明確時程規範。

all.en: Witnesses are interviewed separately to preserve the integrity of statements.
all.zh: 證人分開進行訪談以維護陳述的完整性。

all.en: Findings are reviewed by an independent committee before any action is taken.
all.zh: 調查結果於採取任何行動前須經獨立委員會審查。

all.en: Disciplinary outcomes range from coaching to termination depending on severity.
all.zh: 懲處結果視嚴重程度從輔導至終止僱用不等。

all.en: Restorative practices are offered to repair relationships where appropriate.
all.zh: 在適當情況下提供修復式作法以重建關係。

all.en: Training completion records are audited annually for accuracy and coverage.
all.zh: 訓練完成紀錄每年稽核以確保準確度與涵蓋率。

all.en: External legal counsel reviews policies to ensure they remain fully compliant.
all.zh: 外部法律顧問檢視政策以確保完全合規。

all.en: Employee resource groups partner with the ethics team to promote awareness.
all.zh: 員工資源社團與倫理團隊合作以提升相關意識。

all.en: Open dialogue with leadership reinforces our zero tolerance position firmly.
all.zh: 與領導層的公開對話堅定強化我們零容忍的立場。

all.en: Honestly, the most powerful moment in last year's training was when a senior director shared her own past experience.
all.zh: 說真的，去年訓練最有力量的時刻，是一位資深總監分享自己過去親身經歷的那一刻。

all.en: Last month a colleague quietly asked me how to support a friend who had just spoken up about a difficult situation.
all.zh: 上個月一位同事低聲問我，該如何支持一位剛鼓起勇氣說出難堪遭遇的朋友。

all.en: I personally believe the bravest thing in any office is to gently interrupt a joke that crosses a line.
all.zh: 我個人相信，職場上最勇敢的事，就是溫和地打斷一個越線的玩笑。

all.en: Our team now keeps a card by the printer with three simple sentences for stepping in as a bystander.
all.zh: 我們團隊現在在影印機旁放了張小卡，上面寫著三句簡單的旁觀者介入用語。

all.en: Honestly, completing the training during a quiet Tuesday morning is far better than rushing it on the deadline day.
all.zh: 說真的，安靜的週二早上完成訓練，比在截止日當天匆忙趕完好太多了。

all.en: A friend in another office said she finally felt safe enough to use the hotline after this year's session.
all.zh: 另一個辦公室的朋友說，她在今年這場訓練後終於覺得夠安全，可以撥打那支通報專線。

all.en: Our ethics lead always reminds us that listening matters far more than offering the perfect response.
all.zh: 我們的倫理主管總提醒大家，聽見對方比急著給出完美回應重要太多。

all.en: Last week two teammates practiced a short bystander script together so it would not feel awkward in the moment.
all.zh: 上週兩位隊友互相練習一段簡短的旁觀者介入台詞，這樣真的遇到時就不會卡住。

all.en: Looking back, the colleagues who quietly checked in on me after a tough meeting changed how I view my workplace.
all.zh: 回頭看，那些在我經歷一場難熬會議後默默關心我的同事，徹底改變了我看待這個職場的方式。

all.en: Tonight I plan to send a short thank-you message to a coworker who stood up for me in a meeting last month.
all.zh: 今晚我打算傳一則簡短的感謝訊息給上個月在會議裡替我發聲的那位同事。
